command:
cd /tmp
echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/phase8i_debug.py
python3 /tmp/phase8i_debug.py

echo "=== PROBE: what does Understand Request output? ==="
echo "-- runtime command --"
curl -s -X POST "http://192.168.0.191:5678/webhook/chatgpt-homelab-agent" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"router info"}' -o /tmp/debug1.json
python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/debug1.json')); d=d[0] if isinstance(d,list) else d; s=d.get('sentinel',{}); print('keys:', s.get('debug_keys')); print('message:', s.get('debug_message')); print('command:', s.get('debug_command')); print('module:', s.get('debug_module')); print('full:', s.get('debug_full','')[:300])"

echo "-- governance command --"
curl -s -X POST "http://192.168.0.191:5678/webhook/chatgpt-homelab-agent" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"governance change request","changeId":"test","baseline":"b","rollbackPlan":"r","evidence":"e"}' -o /tmp/debug2.json
python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/debug2.json')); d=d[0] if isinstance(d,list) else d; s=d.get('sentinel',{}); print('keys:', s.get('debug_keys')); print('message:', s.get('debug_message')); print('command:', s.get('debug_command')); print('module:', s.get('debug_module')); print('full:', s.get('debug_full','')[:400])"
